prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年基准位次5843名、2026年招生计划大幅缩减28.4%（竞争加剧）、抖音高热及热门工科专业升温（报考热度上升）等多重因素，位次将明显前移；同时考虑本省物理类考生总数略有下降的缓和作用，预测2026年最低位次约4878名，区间4378–5378名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for science (physics category) were approximately 4044 → 4717 → 5981 → 6209 → 5843, showing an overall backward trend. After reaching a peak of 6209 in 2024, it slightly rebounded to 5843 in 2025, with a fluctuation range of about 5843–6209 in recent two years. The baseline ranking for 2025 is approximately 5843. The enrollment plan for science (physics category) in Heilongjiang Province from 2021 to 2025 was 60 → 62 → 61 → 71 → 74, showing a gradual small expansion trend. In 2026, the plan significantly reduces to 53, a decrease of 21 students (about 28.4%) compared to 2025. This substantial reduction will intensify competition and push rankings forward.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class university. Ranked approximately 31st in the 2026 Soft Science China University Main Ranking, with a stable range of 29–32 in recent years, belonging to the top tier of national universities. Its reputation has been stable in recent years, with no significant negative public opinion incidents. It ranks 16th in overall Douyin school popularity (high heat), with high exposure on short video platforms, reflecting continuously rising application attention, which positively drives competition. In the fifth round of discipline evaluation, it has 8 disciplines rated A- or above: Chemistry A, Mechanical Engineering A, Business Administration A, Computer Science and Technology A-, Electrical Engineering A-, Applied Economics A-, Control Science and Engineering A-, Civil Engineering A-. Among them, advantageous engineering disciplines such as Computer Science, Electrical Engineering, and Mechanical Engineering highly match the enrollment majors in Heilongjiang Province, strongly attracting applicants to related majors.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering and Automation have maintained high social heat and recommendations from 2024 to 2026, aligning with the main engineering majors recruited by the university in Heilongjiang. The rising popularity of hot majors will attract more high-scoring applicants. In 2026, the number of physics category examinees in Heilongjiang Province is approximately 113,600, slightly decreasing from 117,400 in 2025, slightly easing competition pressure.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering multiple factors such as the 2025 baseline ranking of 5843, a significant 28.4% reduction in the 2026 enrollment plan (intensified competition), high Douyin heat, and rising popularity of hot engineering majors (increased application heat), the ranking will clearly move forward. At the same time, considering the slight decrease in the total number of physics category examinees in the province as a mitigating factor, the predicted minimum ranking for 2026 is approximately 4878, with a range of 4378–5378.

For rankings within the predicted range, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors (Mathematics, Intelligent Manufacturing Engineering, Artificial Intelligence, Microelectronics, etc.) as primary choices, Tier 1 majors (Electrical Engineering, Computer Science, etc.) as reach targets, and Tier 3 majors (Finance, Big Data, Law) as safe backups. Rankings significantly better than the lower bound (<4378) can focus on reaching for Tier 1 flagship majors; rankings near the upper bound (>5378) are advised to prioritize Tier 3 backups.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for liberal arts (history category) were approximately 580 → 635 → 589 → 878 → 609, with significant fluctuations. In 2024, due to the first year of the new college entrance exam, there was a notable drop to 878, but it quickly rebounded to 609 in 2025. The baseline ranking for 2025 is approximately 609. The university's enrollment plan for liberal arts (history category) in Heilongjiang Province from 2021 to 2025 was 14 → 15 → 16 → 18 → 17 students, remaining stable within the 14–18 range. In 2026, the plan significantly expands to 41 students, an increase of 24 students (approximately 141%) compared to 2025. This substantial expansion will greatly alleviate competition and push the ranking backward.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: It is a 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class university. In the 2026 Soft Science Chinese University Main Ranking, it is approximately 31st, with recent rankings stable in the 29–32 range, placing it among the top universities nationwide. Its reputation has been stable in recent years, with no significant negative public opinion incidents. On Douyin (TikTok), the university's overall popularity ranking is 16th (high heat), with high exposure on short video platforms, reflecting increasing attention from applicants and positively driving competition. In the fifth round of discipline evaluation, it has 8 disciplines rated A- or above, including Business Administration (A) and Applied Economics (A-), which are relevant to liberal arts admissions. Although liberal arts majors such as Law, Chinese Language and Literature, and History did not receive A-level ratings, they remain highly attractive due to the 985 platform.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Liberal arts majors such as Law and Chinese Language/Literature are generally recommended in terms of social popularity, while Finance/Accounting/Economics are divided and wait-and-see. In 2026, the number of history category examinees in Heilongjiang Province is approximately 53,400, a slight decrease from 54,700 in 2025, leading to a slight easing of competitive pressure.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering multiple factors such as the 2025 baseline ranking of 609, the significant 141% expansion in enrollment plan for 2026 (greatly easing competition), high Douyin popularity, and relatively stable popularity of liberal arts majors, the ranking will notably shift backward. Additionally, taking into account the slight decrease in the total number of history category examinees in the province, which has a moderating effect, the predicted minimum ranking for 2026 is approximately 1105, with a range of 939–1271.
